The `VerifyHostToken` function in `logic/jwts.go` does not validate the JWT signature when verifying host tokens. After calling `jwt.ParseWithClaims`, the function only checks whether the returned token object is non-nil. It does not check `token.Valid` or the returned error. An attacker can forge a JWT signed with any key, set the claims to any host ID, and pull that host's full configuration including bcrypt-hashed passwords, MQTT credentials, and WireGuard peer data. The issue was patched in v1.5.0.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00298, "percentile": 0.21527}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-qpv2-rwc8-c993", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-05T14:45:55Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qpv2-rwc8-c993", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-qpv2-rwc8-c993"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-38651"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-28T16:16:13Z", "published_at": "2026-04-28T18:30:33Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-38651", "https://github.com/gravitl/netmaker/commit/5309aa70d464ef565911369714d661a61481a79b", "https://www.zyenra.com/advisories/netmaker-jwt-verification-bypass", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qpv2-rwc8-c993"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/gravitl/netmaker", "summary": "Netmaker does not verify JWT signatures for host tokens", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-05T14:45:58Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-qpv2-rwc8-c993", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.5.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/gravitl/netmaker"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.5.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Netmaker does not verify JWT signatures for host tokens
